text.zh: AlphaGo 结合了策略网络、价值网络和蒙特卡洛树搜索。
text.en: AlphaGo combined policy networks, value networks, and Monte Carlo tree search.

text.zh: AlphaGo 在 2016 年与李世石的五番棋中获胜。
text.en: AlphaGo won the five-game match against Lee Sedol in 2016.

text.zh: AlphaGo 的神经搜索和自我对弈路线影响了后续 AlphaGo Zero、AlphaZero 和 MuZero 等系统。
text.en: AlphaGo’s neural search and self-play pattern influenced later systems such as AlphaGo Zero, AlphaZero, and MuZero.
